prompt_text:
“House of the Rising Sun”, deep voice, bass voice, old man singing, dark country cover of 'House of the Rising Sun' with deep male vocals, Utilize a steel-string guitar for twangy accompaniment, mournful harmonica for added atmosphere, subtle percussion. Keep the tempo slow and steady, lyrics resonate deeply with the listener. Capture the essence of the original.

[Verse]
Am C D F Am C E E

[Chorus]
Am C D F Am E Am E
prompt_zh: “House of the Rising Sun”，低沉的嗓音，低音嗓音，老人的歌声，使用深沉的男声演绎的黑暗乡村 (Dark Country) 版本的 'House of the Rising Sun'。使用钢弦吉他进行带有颤音的伴奏，悲凉的口琴增加氛围感，轻微的打击乐。保持节奏缓慢而稳定，歌词深深触动听众。捕捉原曲的精髓。
title: The House Of The Rising Sun
